name: Crispy Oat Herrings and Apple Rings (Irish)
recipeIngredient: 1 Melted Fat or Oil to Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and scale the herrings, removing fins. Wash in cold water and dry well.
2. Season with salt and pepper. Dip herrings in beaten egg, then coat with oatmeal.
3. Fry in hot fat for 4-5 minutes on each side. Drain well on paper towels and keep hot.
4. Wash apples, core them, and cut into slices. Fry in hot fat for a few seconds, turning once.
5. Serve herrings with apple rings on a hot dish. Garnish with parsley sprigs.
6. Serve with cider sauce.
